You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/datasources/list/CreateDataSourceModal/CreateDataSourceForm.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 14
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-emptystate-emptystateicon-d-ts-emptystateiconprops-removed-group-2]:
This rule contains 2 migration steps. Apply each one independently:

Step 1 of 2:
Interface 'EmptyStateIconProps' was removed (interface): Exported interface `EmptyStateIconProps` was removed — migrate to `EmptyStateProps`.
  Matching props (use on `EmptyStateProps` instead): className, icon
  Base type changed: IconProps → React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>. Inherited members from the old base type are no longer available.

File: packages/react-core/src/components/EmptyState/EmptyStateIcon.d.ts
Before: interface: EmptyStateIconProps

Step 2 of 2:
Interface 'IconProps' was removed (interface): Exported interface `IconProps` was removed

Before: interface: IconProps


Incident context:
  importedName: Icon
  localName: Icon
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: EmptyStateIconProps
To: EmptyStateProps
Replacement: EmptyStateProps
Mappings:
  EmptyStateIconProps -> EmptyStateProps
Member mappings:
  icon -> icon
  className -> titleClassName

Code context:
```
   13    FormGroup,
   14    Icon,
   15    NumberInput,

```

### Fix 2
Line: 99
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-form-group-label-help]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help

Code context:
```
   98                aria-label="More info for retain revisions field"
   99                className="pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help"
  100                onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 123, 126
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-stackitem-component]:
Component <StackItem> has a new prop `component` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <StackItem> and determine if any should be moved to the `component` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <StackItem>{content} other children</StackItem>
  After:  <StackItem component=>other children</StackItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: StackItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Stack

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: StackItem
Prop: component
To: React.ReactNode

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 123):
  122            <Stack>
  123              <StackItem>
  124                <MutedTextSpan text={t('Specify the number of revisions that should be retained.')} />

  (line 126):
  125              </StackItem>
  126              <StackItem>
  127                <MutedTextSpan

```

### Fix 4
Line: 16
Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Popover
  localName: Popover
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
   15    NumberInput,
   16    Popover,
   17    Stack,

```

### Fix 5
Line: 99
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-form-group-label-help]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help

Code context:
```
   98                aria-label="More info for retain revisions field"
   99                className="pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help"
  100                onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/datasources/list/CreateDataSourceModal/CreateDataSourceForm.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix against the current file state:

**Fix 1 (Line 14 - `Icon` import removal):** The `Icon` component was removed. Looking at usage on lines 103-105, `<Icon><HelpIcon /></Icon>` — since `Icon` is removed, I should remove the wrapper and use `<HelpIcon />` directly. Remove `Icon` from imports.

**Fix 2 (Line 99 - CSS class `pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help`):** Looking at line 99, it already shows `pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help`. But the fix says this class doesn't exist in v6 either — it was removed entirely. Since this is a `labelHelp` button inside a `Popover` attached to a `FormGroup`'s `labelHelp` prop, the PatternFly v6 `FormGroupLabelHelp` component is the proper replacement. However, looking at the code, the project already imports `FormGroupLabelHelp` isn't available here. The simplest fix is to remove the className since the class doesn't exist in v6.

**Fix 3 (Lines 123, 126 - `StackItem` new `component` prop):** The `component` prop on `StackItem` accepts a `React.ReactNode`. Looking at the context, these `StackItem` components each contain a single `MutedTextSpan` child. The `component` prop is for specifying the HTML element type (like `div`, `span`), not for absorbing JSX children. These simple children should remain as children. No change needed.

**Fix 4 (Line 16 - `Popover` behavioral change):** This is an informational warning about Popover's sub-component changes. The Popover is used in JSX rendering, not in tests. No code change is needed for a behavioral/test advisory in a non-test file.

**Fix 5 (Line 99 - CSS class `pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help`):** Same as Fix 2 — the class was removed. Currently shows `pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help` which also doesn't exist. Need to remove the className.

Let me now apply the changes:

1. **Fix 1**: Remove `Icon` from import, unwrap `<Icon><HelpIcon /></Icon>` → `<HelpIcon />`
2. **Fix 2 & 5**: Remove the `className="pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help"` line since this CSS class was fully removed
3. **Fix 3**: No change — `StackItem`'s `component` prop is for element type, not content absorption
4. **Fix 4**: No change — informational warning for tests, this is not a test file
Now let me verify the final state of the file:
The file looks correct. All edits have been applied cleanly. Let me verify there are no remaining references to `Icon` (the removed component) or the dead CSS class:

Good — the only remaining `Icon` references are `HelpIcon` (from `@patternfly/react-icons`, which is correct and unaffected). No references to the removed CSS class remain.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Icon` component removed (Line 14)
**Applied.** Removed `Icon` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import. Unwrapped `<Icon><HelpIcon /></Icon>` to just `<HelpIcon />` (lines 103–105 → line 101). The `Icon` wrapper component was removed in PF v6; `HelpIcon` from `@patternfly/react-icons` is used directly.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help` removed (Line 99)
**Applied.** The class had already been renamed to `pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help` in a prior pass, but that v6 class also doesn't exist (fully removed). Removed the `className` attribute entirely from the button element.

### Fix 3 — `StackItem` new `component` prop (Lines 123, 126)
**No change needed.** The `component` prop on `StackItem` specifies the rendered HTML element type (e.g., `"div"`, `"span"`), not JSX content absorption. The existing children (`MutedTextSpan` components) are correctly placed as children and should not be moved to the `component` prop.

### Fix 4 — `Popover` behavioral change (Line 16)
**No change needed.** This is an informational/test advisory about Popover's sub-component `appendTo` default changing. This file is not a test file, and the Popover usage here (inside `labelHelp` on a `FormGroup`) does not depend on the portal append target behavior. No code change required.

### Fix 5 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help` removed (Line 99)
**Already applied by Fix 2.** Same line, same class, same resolution — the `className` attribute was removed.

chunks.response:
Good — the only remaining `Icon` references are `HelpIcon` (from `@patternfly/react-icons`, which is correct and unaffected). No references to the removed CSS class remain.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Icon` component removed (Line 14)
**Applied.** Removed `Icon` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import. Unwrapped `<Icon><HelpIcon /></Icon>` to just `<HelpIcon />` (lines 103–105 → line 101). The `Icon` wrapper component was removed in PF v6; `HelpIcon` from `@patternfly/react-icons` is used directly.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help` removed (Line 99)
**Applied.** The class had already been renamed to `pf-v6-c-form__group-label-help` in a prior pass, but that v6 class also doesn't exist (fully removed). Removed the `className` attribute entirely from the button element.

### Fix 3 — `StackItem` new `component` prop (Lines 123, 126)
**No change needed.** The `component` prop on `StackItem` specifies the rendered HTML element type (e.g., `"div"`, `"span"`), not JSX content absorption. The existing children (`MutedTextSpan` components) are correctly placed as children and should not be moved to the `component` prop.

### Fix 4 — `Popover` behavioral change (Line 16)
**No change needed.** This is an informational/test advisory about Popover's sub-component `appendTo` default changing. This file is not a test file, and the Popover usage here (inside `labelHelp` on a `FormGroup`) does not depend on the portal append target behavior. No code change required.

### Fix 5 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-form__group-label-help` removed (Line 99)
**Already applied by Fix 2.** Same line, same class, same resolution — the `className` attribute was removed.
